---

### ❌ CONFIRMED ABSENCES (Out of the Tournament)

1. **Rodrygo (Real Madrid) – Torn ACL & Meniscus**
Real Madrid's Rodrygo suffered a serious knee injury in March, with a torn ACL and meniscus ruling him out for what is likely to be the rest of 2026. He was Brazil's second-top scorer with three goals during their qualifying campaign.

Militão suffered a hamstring tear that required surgery, ruling him out of the World Cup entirely
